Enter your details to join the Discivo c: Enter your details to join the Discivo community.
Discivo helps lost disc golf discs find: Discivo helps lost disc golf discs find their way back home. If you've ever lost your favorite driver in the woods or fished someone else's disc out of a pond, you already know the pain on both sides.
Discivo connects people who find discs w: Discivo connects people who find discs with those who lost them — in one simple, searchable place. Report lost or found discs with location, brand, color, and more; we suggest matches so you can connect and arrange a handoff.
Help intro: Quick guide to reporting discs, messaging, confirming matches, and handing over.
Help step 1: Report a lost or found disc with location, time, and colors.
Help step 2: We suggest potential matches based on your report.
Help step 3: Open the chat and message the other person to verify details (inscription, plastic, etc.).
Help step 4: When you both agree, confirm the match and arrange a handover.
Help messaging 1: Use the chat to share details and confirm you’re talking about the same disc.
Help messaging 2: Enter sends the message. Use Shift+Enter for a new line.
Help messaging 3: You can keep messaging even after a match is confirmed or handed over.
Help confirm 1: Both sides must confirm for the match to become confirmed.
Help handover 1: After confirming, both sides mark handed over when the disc is returned.
Help reject 1: Reject a match if it’s not the right disc.
Help activity 1: Discs stay active while a match is pending.
Help activity 2: When both sides confirm a match, both discs become inactive (so they won’t be matched again).
Help activity 3: If a match is rejected, the match thread is rejected but the discs stay active.
Help expires 1: Disc reports automatically become inactive after 90 days.
Help expires 2: You can renew an inactive disc for another 90 days from the disc details page (one click).
Help tip 1: Add a clear location text (course name / landmark) for better matching.
Help tip 2: Write the disc’s back text/inscription exactly as it appears.
Help tip 3: If you made a mistake, edit your disc report while it’s still active.
Help tip 4: If you don’t know a detail (manufacturer, plastic, mold, etc.), you can leave the field empty.
Help contact: If something looks wrong, start with the chat. You can also check your messages and your reported discs.
Help admin message hint: Write to an admin if you need help or want to report a bug.

Today, most found discs end up in Facebo: Today, most found discs end up in Facebook groups. Posts get buried fast, large "found disc" dumps are hard to search, and weeks can pass before the owner even sees them. Discivo fixes that.
With Discivo, players can report lost an: With Discivo, players can report lost and found discs with detailed information like location, time, brand, color, and any writing on the disc. Our system automatically compares reports and suggests potential matches. When both sides confirm it's the right disc, you can connect, arrange a handoff, and close the case.
It's all about helping discs — and playe: It's all about helping discs — and players — find their way back to each other.

If you've ever lost your favorite driver: If you've ever lost your favorite driver in the woods or fished someone else's disc out of a pond, you already know the pain on both sides. Discivo connects the people who find discs with the people who lost them — in one simple, searchable place.
